title: blumea subracemosa
intro: Blumea subracemosa, also known as the Chinese wormwood or white top, is a flowering plant belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to China and used in traditional medicine for centuries. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its rich content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Blumea subracemosa include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve fever, and reduce inflammation, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being incorporated into tonics and other medicinal preparations.
